overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night in a truck simulator game. Windshield wipers continuously clear heavy snowfall as the vehicle navigates through winter conditions, overtaking other trucks and passing under overhead road signs. The dashboard displays and GPS navigation are illuminated while snow accumulates on the side windows.

events.description: overtaking a semi-truck on the right side of the highway
approaching a white truck ahead in the same lane

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from the truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night. The dashboard instruments are illuminated and windshield wipers work continuously against heavy snow. The vehicle overtakes a truck on the right and approaches another white truck ahead, with snow-covered concrete barriers lining both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with concrete barrier walls

events.description: driving alongside and overtaking a large white Volvo semi-truck on the right
driver turns head and camera to check right side mirror and blind spot

agents.ego_description: overtaking a large Volvo truck on the right side while maintaining highway speed, then checking the side mirror before returning focus to the road

notable_agents.action: large white Volvo semi-truck with trailer being overtaken on the right
red car visible in the distance traveling in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The truck continues down the snowy highway, overtaking a large white Volvo semi-truck on the right. Around the 26-second mark, the driver briefly turns to check the right side mirror, showing the snow-covered side window and mirror, before returning to the forward view. Snow barriers continue to line both sides of the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway section with overhead directional sign gantry

exiting the sign gantry area back to open highway with only barriers visible

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while passing under overhead road signs and continuing down the highway

notable_agents.action: truck visible ahead in the distance traveling in the same direction

entered.detail: large blue highway directional sign suspended over the road
metal support structure for the overhead sign gantry
metal support structure for the overhead sign gantry

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and passes under a large overhead highway sign gantry with blue directional signs and metal support pillars. After passing the signs, the scene returns to the open highway view with snow-covered barriers on both sides. Another truck is visible ahead in the distance through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with concrete barrier walls

events.description: overtaking a semi-truck on the right side of the highway
settling back into the center lane after completing the overtaking maneuver

agents.ego_description: overtaking another semi-truck on the right and continuing down the snowy highway with wipers maintaining visibility

notable_agents.action: semi-truck being overtaken on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck continuing down the highway, overtaking another semi-truck on the right side. The overhead road signs from the previous segment are now behind the vehicle. The truck maintains steady speed through the persistent snowfall, with windshield wipers continuously clearing the view and snow-covered barriers lining both sides of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin navigating a heavy midnight snowfall on a highway. It begins with the illuminated dashboard and windshield wipers working steadily against the storm as the vehicle maneuvers past a truck on the right and closes in on another white truck ahead. As the truck maintains its speed, the camera briefly shifts focus toward the right side mirror, revealing the thick accumulation of snow on the side window before returning to the road. The scene then expands as the vehicle successfully overtakes a large white Volvo semi-truck, continuing forward between endless snow-covered concrete barriers that line both sides of the highway.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a truck navigates a snowy highway, moving from beneath a highway gantry into an open stretch of winter road. It begins by passing under a large overhead sign gantry with blue directional signs and metal support pillars, which quickly recedes into the distance. As the vehicle emerges back into the open air, the view expands to reveal snow-covered barriers lining both sides of the road and another truck visible through the heavy snowfall. The scene then shifts as the truck maintains a steady speed, pulling out to overtake a semi-truck on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward through the persistent storm, with windshield wipers continuously clearing the glass to maintain visibility of the frozen landscape.
